email.title: Email
email.description: Optional. Leave blank for anonymous storefront recommendations; pass only when the shopper is signed in or voluntarily shared email.

intent.title: Intent
intent.description: Current service intent such as order status, return, refund, tracking, or case.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email
verifiedEmail.description: Pass loggedInEmail. Required before returning private saved-cart, coupon, order, Data Cloud, or case context.
